Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to merge logs Provide merged log with attributes Provide reasoning Use timestamp tolerance 2 seconds Need to align events Compare timestamps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A 100000 Order Received 100130 Order Validated 100200 Payment Processed 100500 Item Shipped 102000 Item Delivered Log B 095958 OrderReceived 100129 OrderValidation 100205 PaymentCheck 100300 Quality Check 100502 Shipping

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order Received vs OrderReceived Order Validated vs OrderValidation Item Shipped vs Shipping

Name: Validation - PE
Text: timestamps 100000 vs 095958 diff 2 seconds Within tolerance merge 100130 vs 100129 diff 1 sec 100500 vs 100502 diff 2 sec Within tolerance merge

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Payment Processed vs PaymentCheck It is a payment event but timestamps 5 sec diff Could be same event

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 100200 vs 100205 diff 5 sec greater than tolerance If you cannot confidently match two events leave them separate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Check no direct counterpart in A Item Delivered only in A

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Combine attributes include timestamp choose Log A timestamp as primary for merged events where we merge

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus merged events Order Received with user u45 resource r10 notes Event captured at warehouse system Order Validated with user u12 resource r10 notes Cross check inventory Payment Processed only A PaymentCheck only B Quality Check only B Item Shipped with user u45 resource r10 notes Package handed to courier Item Delivered only A

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now chronological order based on primary timestamp 100000 100130 100200 100205 100300 100500 102000
